principles: Goal: stay sharp and move well on the road — not to peak
Gym: dumbbells, bench, cables, pull-up bar, treadmill; leave 2 reps in reserve
Rotate A → B → C → A → B across the trip
40–45 min. Short on time? Do the first 3 lifts + a treadmill finisher
Protect sleep & hydration while traveling — they matter more than any set

days.warmup: Treadmill brisk walk 5 min + arm circles, bodyweight squats, hip openers

exercises.name: DB goblet squat
cues: Hold one DB at your chest
Brace, sit down between the hips

exercises.name: DB Romanian deadlift
cues: Soft knees, hinge at the hips
Flat back, squeeze glutes at the top

exercises.name: DB bench press
cues: Drive your feet into the floor

exercises.name: 1-arm DB row
cues: Row the DB to your hip

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.notes: Use a band or do slow negatives if needed. Add weight once 3×6 is easy.

exercises.name: DB reverse lunge
cues: Step back, drop the back knee

days.power: Optional primer: 5 crisp bodyweight squat jumps before squats

days.warmup: Treadmill 5 min + leg swings, ankle rocks

exercises.name: DB Romanian deadlift
cues: DBs stay close to the legs

exercises.name: Dead bug
cues: Low back flat on the floor

days.conditioning: Treadmill intervals: 8×(20s hard / 90s easy) — trains fencing's energy system

days.focus: Push / pull + trunk + épée wrist prehab

exercises.name: DB wrist/forearm prehab
cues: Light DB, wrist curls both directions

exercises.name: Hanging knee raise
cues: Curl the knees to your chest

days.conditioning: Treadmill easy 10 min, or optional 6×20s strides

note: Travel block — light and movement-focused. Now using the hotel's cables + pull-up bar too. Weights are auto-estimated; toggle kg/lb up top and spin the wheels to match your gym. Tap ＋ Add exercise on any day to log your own. Back to your real base plan once you're home.
